attrs.comment: The following caveats must be considered: 1) Products have not been fully optimised for very high latitudes, 2) There is a systematic global underestimation of ~0.1 pss early 2010 that gradually disappears over the year, 3) Products are in general of better quality after 2015 due to the inclusion of SMAP data and reduced contaminations (RFI, sun) on SMOS data. We (Mngt_CCI-Salinity@argans.co.uk) are very keen to get users feedbacks about these products
